mapper.select: SELECT * FROM crm_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM crm_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND quotation_id = #{quotationId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM crm_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'PENDING_CONFIRM' ORDER BY created_time ASC
SELECT * FROM crm_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'PRODUCING' ORDER BY required_delivery_date ASC

SELECT * FROM crm_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND required_delivery_date IS NOT NULL AND required_delivery_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND required_delivery_date >= CURDATE() AND status IN ('PRODUCING', 'READY_TO_SHIP') ORDER BY required_delivery_date ASC
